title: TT&A, Linklaters advise Montagu on majority stake acquisition in DQS
description: Montagu Private Equity GmbH has acquired a majority stake in DQS Holding GmbH from a consortium of shareholders.TT&A advised Montagu in relation to the indirect acquisition of the Indian subsidiary of DQS i.e. Deutsch Quality Systems (India) Private Limited.The transaction team consisted of Neville Golwalla (Partner), Jasel Mundhra (Senior Associate), Associates Nandini Pradhan and Pranav Kandada.Neville GolwallaLinklaters advised Montagu on the global transaction.An international cross-prac
